◎简　　介  

　　In "60 Days In," Sheriff Lamb in Arizona carefully selected 7 innocent people to go undercover for a deep dive into the inner workings of his facility. Unlike past seasons, the participants were given specific missions by the sheriff & one rogue participant threatened to blow the program, leaving their fellow participants in a dangerous position.
